scenes.text: In this scene, we explore the concept of JavaScript functions, which are fundamental building blocks in modern web development. A function is a reusable block of code that performs a specific task. By defining functions, developers can create modular code, improving readability and maintainability. This scene will demonstrate how to declare a simple JavaScript function and how to use it within a program.

This scene delves into the flow of control in a program using a flowchart. Visualizing the logical steps in a sequence allows developers to plan and understand complex decision-making within applications. We'll demonstrate a simple decision-making process to showcase how different paths are executed based on conditions provided in the program.
scenes.image_prompt:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[Evaluate Expression]
    B -->|True| C[Execute True Block]
    B -->|False| D[Execute False Block]
    C --> E[End]
    D --> E
